overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, with atmospheric fog creating depth among historic brick buildings with wrought iron balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk arcade transitioning to open street

events.description: exits the covered sidewalk arcade into the open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk before stepping onto the open street

notable_agents.action: man in suit standing under the covered walkway looking at the street
woman in long dress standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: overhanging roof structure covering the wooden sidewalk with support posts
historic wooden building with shuttered windows and weathered planks
colorful vintage posters plastered on the building wall advertising shows
cast iron gas lamp emitting warm yellow light
ornate wrought iron balconies on the building at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered sidewalk arcade with wooden support posts and vintage theater posters on the right wall. The character walks forward along wet cobblestones, passing pedestrians standing under the cover. Around 9 seconds, the scene transitions from the sheltered walkway to the open street, revealing gas lamps and historic buildings with wrought iron balconies ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with saloons and shops

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the cobblestone street passing by various storefronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt walking toward the camera on the street

entered.detail: storefront with green signage reading 'Wines & Liquors' and 'Cigars'
green hanging sign advertising 'Furnished Rooms' attached to a pole
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the sidewalk
elaborate cast iron railings on second floor balconies of brick buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking down the narrow cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings featuring wrought iron balconies. The warm glow of gas lamps illuminates the wet pavement. The character passes a 'Wines & Liquors' storefront and a 'Furnished Rooms' sign, with wooden barrels stacked on the sidewalks. The atmosphere is quiet with few pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square intersection with prominent bank building

events.description: character turns right at the corner, shifting view toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner and walking toward the large building at the intersection

entered.detail: imposing three-story brick building with tall windows dominating the intersection
open cobblestone square where multiple streets converge
signage on the large building indicating a bank or municipal structure

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at a corner, exiting the narrow commercial street into a more open intersection. The view opens toward a large, imposing brick building that dominates the town square. The streets are empty, with only the warm glow of gas lamps reflecting off the wet cobblestones. The character approaches the central building as the camera moves through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into the open, lamp-lit intersections of a historic city at night. It begins under a covered sidewalk arcade, passing wooden support posts and vintage theater posters while moving along wet cobblestones. As the camera leaves the sheltered walkway, the scene opens into a narrow street lined with brick buildings and wrought iron balconies, where the warm glow of gas lamps reflects off the pavement past storefronts and stacked wooden barrels. The movement then shifts as the character turns a corner, exiting the commercial corridor into a wider, quiet intersection. Finally, the view expands toward a large, imposing brick building that dominates the town square under the atmospheric night light.
